{{Quote|[Aga Culpa] might rule [the Smuggler's Moon], but he doesn't control it. Everyone on Nar Shaddaa answers to Krayn.|Gogol to Obi-Wan Kenobi at the Dor|<ref name="Jedi Quest: Path to Truth">''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''</ref>}}
'''Gogol''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] criminal who haunted [[Splendor Tavern|the Dor]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Gogol sold [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] information about the slave-[[Pirate/Legends|raider]] [[Krayn]]'s dealings with the [[Colicoid/Legends|Colicoids]], about which ties the Jedi Master had been suspicious since Krayn's attack on a [[Colicoid cargo ship]] that Kenobi and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|his Padawan]] were escorting, and [[Anf Dec|its captain's]] rage at Krayn, as if the assault and resultant offense taken had been of a personal nature.

Kenobi learned from Gogol that the Colocoids had recently and secretly taken over the [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] mines and that they were planning a total usurpation of the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade, including of its processing factories run by Krayn on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], the "Smuggler's Moon"—operations made possible by Krayn's seemingly inexhaustible supply of slaves.

==Behind the scenes==
Gogol appears to be of the same species as [[Fay]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Lourdes]]. All these individuals appear to be Human, but with pointy ears. [[Leland Chee]], on the [[StarWars.com Message Boards]], stated that his theory is that "all pointy-eared species are either [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] or closely related to Sephi."<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1395#16675997|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2007-06-08|time=6:48 AM|quote=For the longest time we've used dozens of pointy-eared characters without a species name for them. The pointed-eared species in the Jedi: Yoda comic were named Sephi. My theory is that all pointy-eared species are either Sephi or closely related to Sephi.}}</ref>
